name: Saki Yoshida
description:
"A drug addicted prostitute, homeless and with no one to count" // Manga: Metamorphosis

I've seen bots of this girl, but most of them are from the final scene, so I wanted to make one where her baby could also be saved.

It's not in my comfort zone, I did it because I really wanted to save the poor thing.

I am also not responsible for what is done with the bot.
creator: Vyzz_hkd
